query:
INSERT INTO `site_config` (`configKey`, `configValue`) VALUES 
('about_us_en', '{"title":"About SaySerné","mission":"We believe that finding the right professional should be simple, transparent, and trustworthy.","missionP2":"Our platform uses a meritocratic ranking system where professionals earn their reputation through verified client reviews.","values":[{"title":"Trust & Transparency","desc":"Every review is verified through completed bookings"},{"title":"Meritocracy","desc":"Rankings based on real performance"},{"title":"Omnichannel Access","desc":"Seamless experience across web, mobile, and all touchpoints"},{"title":"Community First","desc":"Building meaningful connections between professionals and clients"}]}'),
('about_us_ar', '{"title":"عن SaySerné","mission":"نؤمن بأن إيجاد المحترف المناسب يجب أن يكون بسيطاً وشفافاً وموثوقاً.","missionP2":"تستخدم منصتنا نظام تصنيف جدارة حيث يكسب المحترفون سمعتهم من خلال تقييمات العملاء الموثقة.","values":[{"title":"الثقة والشفافية","desc":"كل تقييم موثق من خلال حجوزات مكتملة"},{"title":"الجدارة","desc":"التصنيفات مبنية على الأداء الحقيقي"},{"title":"وصول متعدد القنوات","desc":"تجربة سلسة عبر الويب والجوال"},{"title":"المجتمع أولاً","desc":"بناء روابط ذات معنى بين المحترفين والعملاء"}]}')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `configValue` = VALUES(`configValue`);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3MzNopcSwJXugWj.root --database fSXYjnqatsqbzh69FLd2k9 --execute INSERT INTO `site_config` (`configKey`, `configValue`) VALUES 
('about_us_en', '{"title":"About SaySerné","mission":"We believe that finding the right professional should be simple, transparent, and trustworthy.","missionP2":"Our platform uses a meritocratic ranking system where professionals earn their reputation through verified client reviews.","values":[{"title":"Trust & Transparency","desc":"Every review is verified through completed bookings"},{"title":"Meritocracy","desc":"Rankings based on real performance"},{"title":"Omnichannel Access","desc":"Seamless experience across web, mobile, and all touchpoints"},{"title":"Community First","desc":"Building meaningful connections between professionals and clients"}]}'),
('about_us_ar', '{"title":"عن SaySerné","mission":"نؤمن بأن إيجاد المحترف المناسب يجب أن يكون بسيطاً وشفافاً وموثوقاً.","missionP2":"تستخدم منصتنا نظام تصنيف جدارة حيث يكسب المحترفون سمعتهم من خلال تقييمات العملاء الموثقة.","values":[{"title":"الثقة والشفافية","desc":"كل تقييم موثق من خلال حجوزات مكتملة"},{"title":"الجدارة","desc":"التصنيفات مبنية على الأداء الحقيقي"},{"title":"وصول متعدد القنوات","desc":"تجربة سلسة عبر الويب والجوال"},{"title":"المجتمع أولاً","desc":"بناء روابط ذات معنى بين المحترفين والعملاء"}]}')
